title: Add explicit MCP snapshot_create tool
goal: Add protected explicit MCP snapshot_create with repo/profile/output-root guards and no indirect creation

acceptance.assertion: The slice is implemented or explicitly closed against current main/PR state with no hidden broadening.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: RepoBrief boundaries are preserved: no hidden refresh, no Git mutation in RepoBrief core, no review/runtime correctness claim.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Relevant tests/checks are run, or a precise blocker/gap is recorded.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: The output states what the evidence does not establish.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.outcome: Implemented in Lenskit PR #914: added explicit MCP-shaped snapshot_create handler with repo/profile/output-root/timeout/size guards, preserving read-only access boundaries and avoiding MCP protocol/server claims.
validation: Lenskit PR #914 GitHub CI passed: pytest-full, ruff, CodeQL, doc-freshness, planning-registration, repo-root, templates, validate-merge-meta, webui-js-tests, contract checks and static security checks.
Local before merge: 125 focused RepoBrief/MCP/access/profile tests passed.
Local before merge: ruff-ci targeted check passed.
Local before merge: git diff --check passed.
Post-merge on origin/main 34f0b46706992a4120c6c6886691005afe86fa37: same 125 focused tests passed.
Post-merge on origin/main: targeted ruff-ci check passed.
Post-merge on origin/main: git diff --check passed.

verified_acceptance.rbv1-t011-scope-bound: PR #914 implements only the explicit MCP-shaped snapshot_create handler, shared CLI result builder, tests and boundary docs/proof; no hidden broadening into protocol server, scheduler, shell, Git, PR, patch, review or runtime authority.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t011-boundary-preserved: Read-only RepoBrief access helpers keep writes=[] and tests assert they do not call snapshot_create; snapshot_create output says explicit_write_tool true and not_reachable_from_read_tools true.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t011-tests-or-gap: 125 focused tests passed locally before and after merge; GitHub CI passed.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t011-non-claims: Docs and proof state no MCP protocol server and no transport/security/runtime/test/review/PR/forensic claim.
